channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-04-21
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: ESMA clarifies expectations in the run-up to the launch of EU’s Consolidated Tapes 01/04/2026 The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financia
item.description: The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator and supervisor, has published Questions and Answers (Q&As) on the onboarding of data contributors to the EU’s Consolidated Tapes (CTs), and on the operational rules for the Consolidated Tape Providers (CTPs). The goal is to increase certainty for all market participants in anticipation of the go-live of the EU’s CTs for bonds and for equities. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (esma news) ; impact marché.

item.title: Postponement of the rollout for Commodity Derivatives Weekly Position Reporting 27/03/2026
item.description: The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator and supervisor, is postponing the rollout of the new solution for Commodity Derivatives Weekly Position Reporting, originally scheduled for 1 April 2026. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (esma news) ; impact marché.

item.title: Workshop Towards Fair Insurance for Consumers with Diabetes and HIV
item.description: The event aims to facilitate a dialogue among industry stakeholders, patient associations, and regulatory bodies to identify areas of potential unfair treatment and explore solutions. — Thématique assurance ; source jugée fiable (eiopa media) ; impact assurance.
